## Testing

## Breaking change?
- [ ] Yes — documented in `contracts/CHANGELOG.md` (if API) or relevant CHANGELOG
- [ ] No

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention: `<type>/<scope>/<description>`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] CLAUDE.md files updated if architecture or conventions changed
- [ ] ADR written if this is a significant architectural decision
